_comment: US policy decision calendar. Static base + Claude weekly updates. See edict-004.

events.title: FOMC Meeting (Mar 18-19)
events.description: Federal Reserve interest rate decision + press conference + updated dot plot

events.title: FOMC Meeting (May 6-7)
events.description: Federal Reserve interest rate decision + press conference

events.title: FOMC Meeting (Jun 17-18)
events.description: Federal Reserve interest rate decision + updated SEP + dot plot

events.title: FOMC Meeting (Jul 29-30)
events.description: Federal Reserve interest rate decision + press conference

events.title: FOMC Meeting (Sep 16-17)
events.description: Federal Reserve interest rate decision + updated SEP + dot plot

events.title: FOMC Meeting (Nov 4-5)
events.description: Federal Reserve interest rate decision + press conference

events.title: FOMC Meeting (Dec 16-17)
events.description: Federal Reserve interest rate decision + updated SEP + dot plot (year-end)

events.title: Treasury FX Report (Spring)
events.description: Semi-annual report to Congress on international economic and exchange rate policies. May label trading partners as currency manipulators.

events.title: Treasury FX Report (Fall)
events.description: Semi-annual report to Congress on international economic and exchange rate policies.

events.title: SEC Crypto Custody Rule Compliance
events.description: SAB 121 successor rule compliance deadline for banks holding crypto assets

events.title: Section 301 Tariff Annual Review
events.description: Annual review of China Section 301 tariffs. Potential for expansion or reduction.

events.title: Russia Energy Sanctions Review
events.description: Periodic review of Russian oil price cap and energy sanctions effectiveness
